title: Vob Bitas

As {{CSWECite|I|76|Bitas, Vob}} establishes that Vob Bitas was [[Death/Legends|killed]] on [[Umgul/Legends|Umgul]] following the article's race, they must have passed away that [[Standard year/Legends|year]].</ref>

{{Quote|Two hours after the odds-defying victory of Blob 14 in the third race at Fondine Raceways, the Umgullian Racing Commission announced findings of banned viscosity-enhancing substances in the winning blob's system. Vob Bitas, the blob's owner, was immediately taken into custody and put to death.|A HoloNet News report|<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|48|sports/13321_1.html|Blob Racing Cheater Killed}}</ref>}}
'''Vob Bitas''' was a [[Gambling/Legends|gambler]] and the owner of [[Blob 14]], an [[Umgullian blob]]. Bitas enhanced Blob 14's viscosity with the aid of illegal substances and, in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], entered the blob in the third [[Blob racing|blob race]] at the [[Fondine Blob Raceways]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Umgul/Legends|Umgul]]. Bitas wagered over one million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] on Blob 14, but the racer's odds-defying victory prompted an investigation that led to the discovery of the substances. Bitas was arrested and subsequently [[Death/Legends|executed]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Bitas had bet a fortune, so the tainted blob saved me over a million credits.|Slish Fondine|<ref name="HNN" />}}
[[File:Umgul.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Vob Bitas cheated in a blob race on Umgul (pictured) and was subsequently executed after being caught.]]
Vob Bitas lived during the [[Great Peace of the Republic|reign]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and was the owner of an [[Umgullian blob]] named [[Blob 14]].<ref name="HNN" /> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> Bitas entered Blob 14 in the third [[Blob racing|blob race]] at<ref name="HNN" /> the [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|279|Umgul}}</ref> [[Umgul/Legends|Umgul's]] [[Fondine Blob Raceways]]. Blob 14 was not expected to win, but Bitas introduced prohibited viscosity-enhancing substances into the creature's system, an offense that was punishable by [[Death/Legends|death]]. Bitas then [[Gambling/Legends|bet]] over one million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] on Blob 14, which defied expected odds and won the race. The [[Umgullian Racing Commission]] immediately investigated the unlikely victory, and when the banned substances were discovered two [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] later, Bitas was taken into custody and executed.<ref name="HNN" />

[[Slish Fondine]], the owner of the raceways, used Bitas's winnings to recuperate [[Currency/Legends|financial]] losses incurred by the scandal. As Bitas was the fourth cheater caught at the raceways that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], Fondine considered deterring further fraud by instituting a harsher penalty than death. Bitas's victory and execution were soon thereafter reported on by an edition of [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition]].<ref name="HNN" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|This is the fourth time this year someone's been caught cheating. We may have to look into a stronger deterrent than the death penalty.|Slish Fondine, following Bitas's execution|<ref name="HNN" />}}
Vob Bitas was a [[Gambler/Legends|gambler]] who was willing to use illegal viscosity-enhancing substances on Blob 14 in order to win a large sum of credits. However, the gambler's untoward ways were revealed by an investigation a mere two hours after the conclusion of the race.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|I'm indebted to Paul Ens and Pablo Hidalgo for helping me get my own ''Star Wars'' character, even if he only lasted a single issue of HoloNet News.|Bob Vitas|<ref name="Bob's blog" />}}
[[File:BobVitas.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Vob Bitas was named after Bob Vitas (pictured).]]
Vob Bitas was first mentioned in "Blob Racing Cheater Killed," an article published in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 48|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #48]] on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="HNN" /> on [[March 21]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN48 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6128630|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=PrinceXizor|date=2002-03-21|time=3:24 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref> Though the site content was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]],<ref name="credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> Ens was responsible for the creation of Bitas.<ref name="Bob's blog">{{Blog|listing=true|swenc}}</ref> The character was [[Tuckerization|named after]] [[Bob Vitas]],<ref name="blog comments">{{Blog|abelgpena|22/comments|How to Become a Star Wars Character in 5 Easy Steps}}</ref> the creator of the fan-made The Completely Unofficial Star Wars Encyclopedia (CUSWE), and he considered it an honor to have been made into a ''[[Star Wars]]'' character.<ref name="Bob's blog" />

In [[2005]], author [[Abel G. Peña]] included Bitas as an example in a blog entry titled "How to Become a Star Wars Character in 5 Easy Steps." As Vitas was a notable figure in the ''Star Wars'' fan community, Peña humorously asserted that he had been able to skip some of the steps. Peña also jokingly implied that Hidalgo had killed Bitas off due to the CUSWE having once been a rival of Hidalgo's own ''Star Wars'' Index in the realm of online fan depositories of ''Star Wars'' knowledge.<ref name="blog comments" />
